form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Elusive Curl at this track last start over 515m (29.75). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior recorded a strong 29.48 over 515m finishing second at this track. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 16 over 515m at this track behind Obscurus beaten 6 lengths (30.06) in a Grade 5. Has run slick time here with a 29.55 PB at the distance. Go close.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 600m. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Bendigo to win by 1.3 lengths in 27.93, beating Bailieston. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 525m at The Meadows behind Dash Parr beaten 5 lengths (30.47). Can't recommend her in this.
